data.content: Plan review requested revisions. The ancestor-inclusion approach is directionally correct for knots-backend.ts and beads-backend.ts, and the proposed tests for parent-chain inclusion vs terminal sibling exclusion are appropriate. However, the plan misses the default CLI code path: getBackend() auto-routes beads repos to BdCliBackend, which delegates list filtering through src/lib/bd.ts. Revise the implementation/test plan to include that path so the Active screen behavior is consistent across supported backends.
